Proving this statement true, it all began in 1930 when two women educational enthusiasts took up a noble initiative. In the erstwhile posh locality of Seshadripuram, Smt. Anandamma and Smt. Seethamma started a primary School. It was a Mangalore -tiled, two-room centre with 20 children. That humble beginning today has become an integral part of the main campus of Seshadripuram College. It can be proudly stated that Seshadripuram Group of Institutions was founded originally as a- 'start-up' initiative by these two women entrepreneurs. The rest is History.

Activities and Societies: Badminton, volleyball, chess and carrom COLLEGEASC Degree College, a contrivance of a team of academicians, had it’s inception in 2009. The institution, affiliated to Bangalore University, has been doing remarkable service in the field of education for the past decade. A humble beginning with 50 students, the college has grown phenomenally and presently houses more than 1000 students. The institution offers graduate programs in Commerce, Management, Computer Applications and Post Graduate program in Commerce. Striving towards excellence, is a dedicated team of highly qualified, experienced and well informed teachers. Apprized with new teaching methodologies and personal touch, this team inspires the young minds to excel. Besides providing ample opportunities for career development, the college equally focuses on extra-curricular activities. The college infrastructure offers an ambience most suitable for the pursuit of Learning and Development.

candidates.headline: Senior Customer Success Manager (CSM) @ Rimigo | MCA Graduate | Cloud Computing, AI & Data Analytics | Travel & Tech Enthusiast
candidates.summary:
I am an MCA graduate with a strong foundation in Computer Science and currently working full-time at Rimigo in the Information Technology & Services industry. My role involves contributing to customer success, operations, and technology-driven processes that enhance overall user experience.

With a keen interest in Cloud Computing, Artificial Intelligence, and data-driven solutions, I enjoy applying technology to solve real-world challenges. I have hands-on experience with tools and technologies such as Python, SQL, cloud platforms, and data analytics frameworks, and I continuously strive to expand my technical and analytical capabilities.

At Rimigo, I work closely across teams to ensure seamless coordination, operational efficiency, and improved customer satisfaction. This role has strengthened my communication skills, ownership mindset, and ability to manage responsibilities in a fast-paced environment.

Outside of work, I am a district-level football winner, which has instilled in me discipline, resilience, and teamwork. I am also passionate about music, movies, and motorsports — interests that fuel my creativity and strategic thinking.

My goal is to grow into a well-rounded technology and customer success professional, contributing to impactful projects in cloud, AI, and digital transformation while building a strong, long-term career.

education.summary:
Completed Master of Computer Applications (MCA) with a focus on software development, cloud computing, artificial intelligence, and data analytics.
Gained hands-on experience through academic projects and research in cloud computing applications in automotive, entertainment, and telecom industries.
Actively engaged in technical events, team projects, and research-based assignments, strengthening both problem-solving and collaborative skills.

Completed Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) with a strong foundation in programming, database management, and software development.
During my BCA, I worked on academic projects that enhanced my knowledge of Java, Python, Web Development, and SQL while also developing strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
My participation in student leadership councils and extracurricular activities improved my teamwork, communication, and organizational abilities — qualities that I continue to carry into my professional journey.

Completed 12th grade with PCMCS (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, Computer Science), building a strong foundation in problem-solving, logical reasoning, and programming basics.
Balanced academics with sports and extracurricular activities, representing the school in football and contributing to team success at the district level.

Completed schooling with a focus on building a strong academic foundation in science, mathematics, and computer basics.
Actively participated in extracurricular activities that helped shape teamwork, discipline, and leadership qualities.

experience.summary: As part of the Central Talent Acquisition team, I am responsible for end-to-end recruitment across various domains, with a primary focus on IT roles. I source candidates through job portals like Naukri, connect with talent across India, and schedule interviews for relevant profiles. In addition to IT hiring, I also handle recruitment for senior level non - IT roles. My responsibilities include conducting initial screenings, coordinating walk-in drives, and managing the offer release and onboarding process for selected candidates.

In this role, I primarily provided chat-based customer support, along with handling a few voice calls. My responsibilities included assisting customers with account deletions and card closure confirmations, maintaining daily trackers, and assigning escalated cases to the relevant departments. I also managed customer queries received via email and WhatsApp. For FTNR (First Time Not Right) cases—where the bank flagged customers who had submitted incorrect details—I would connect with the customer on WhatsApp, share a pre-drafted email template, and guide them to update and send the corrected information to the bank. I actively contributed to team development by conducting PKTs (Process Knowledge Tests) through Google Forms and provided support and explanations to teammates in areas they needed improvement. I was also involved in training new employees and helping them understand the process effectively.
